summary: Completed comprehensive testing of CDScales web development agency website with booking and contact forms. All backend APIs working correctly, frontend forms successfully integrated with email functionality.
passed_tests: Status check creation and retrieval endpoints
Booking form API (/api/booking) - successful submission with email sending
Contact form API (/api/contact) - successful submission with email sending
Form validation for invalid email addresses (422 validation errors)
Frontend booking form - successful submission with timezone selector
Toast notifications working for successful submissions
HTML5 form validation working for required fields and email format
All 12 timezone options available in booking form
Database storage working for both bookings and contacts

success_percentage.frontend: 100% - All UI components and integrations working
success_percentage.form_validation: 100% - Both client-side and server-side validation working
